title: centaurea × nouelii
intro: Centaurea × nouelii, also known as Cornflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, combining the characteristics of Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea montana. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × nouelii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can also be used as a natural dye and in herbal remedies.
